## Verification

- `make test`
- `make lint`
- Docker release smoke test

## Container Images

- `ghcr.io/e12media/satip-lab:<version>`
- `ghcr.io/e12media/satip-lab:<major>.<minor>`
- `ghcr.io/e12media/satip-lab:latest` for final releases

## Notes

SAT>IP Lab Server is a deterministic lab server for client development and CI. It is not a production SAT>IP server and does not replace final validation with real hardware.
